response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack and polyglot experience, but the role requires a Level II Engineering Manager with 2+ years of people management and 3+ years of technical leadership building developer tools at scale. The resume shows no formal people-management experience (no direct reports, no performance review responsibilities), limited explicit developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure focus, and no mobile-platform ecosystem background. Founder/workshop work demonstrates leadership aptitude but does not substitute for managing engineers in a productivity org.
strengths: 13+ years of polyglot software development across web, mobile, embedded, and backend
Demonstrated craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, test tooling (Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Teaching/mentoring track record via workshops, Selenium course, and Refactoring Dojos
concerns: No explicit people-management experience or direct reports listed
Limited developer-tools/build-systems/test-infrastructure focus at the scale the role requires
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience (iOS/Android tooling, mobile build infra)

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and testing infrastructure background
